'''âs-m-l''' ('''shasamal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:naphthalise|naphthalise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-m-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:naphthalise|naphthalise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-m-l
|-
! Lemma
| shasamal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisamal|thisamal]] || [[word:jisamal|jisamal]] || [[word:shisamal|shisamal]] || [[word:kisamal|kisamal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusamal|thuthusamal]] || [[word:jujusamal|jujusamal]] || [[word:shushusamal|shushusamal]] || [[word:kukusamal|kukusamal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusamal|thusamal]] || [[word:jusamal|jusamal]] || [[word:shusamal|shusamal]] || [[word:kusamal|kusamal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusamal|thusamal]] || [[word:jusamal|jusamal]] || [[word:shusamal|shusamal]] || [[word:kusamal|kusamal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesamal|thesamal]] || [[word:jesamal|jesamal]] || [[word:shesamal|shesamal]] || [[word:kesamal|kesamal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosamal|thothosamal]] || [[word:jojosamal|jojosamal]] || [[word:shoshosamal|shoshosamal]] || [[word:kokosamal|kokosamal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosamal|thosamal]] || [[word:josamal|josamal]] || [[word:shosamal|shosamal]] || [[word:kosamal|kosamal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosamal|thosamal]] || [[word:josamal|josamal]] || [[word:shosamal|shosamal]] || [[word:kosamal|kosamal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsamal|thĂŠsamal]] || [[word:jĂŠsamal|jĂŠsamal]] || [[word:shĂŠsamal|shĂŠsamal]] || [[word:kĂŠsamal|kĂŠsamal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasamal|thathasamal]] || [[word:jajasamal|jajasamal]] || [[word:shashasamal|shashasamal]] || [[word:kakasamal|kakasamal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasamal|thasamal]] || [[word:jasamal|jasamal]] || [[word:shasamal|shasamal]] || [[word:kasamal|kasamal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasamal|thasamal]] || [[word:jasamal|jasamal]] || [[word:shasamal|shasamal]] || [[word:kasamal|kasamal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasamal|shasamal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasamal|goshasamal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasamal|gokishasamal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasamalnĂŒ|shasamalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasamalnknĂŒ|goshasamalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamalnĂŒ|gokishasamalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasamalshĂ«|shasamalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasamalnkshĂ«|goshasamalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasamalshĂ«|gokishasamalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamalro|shasamalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamalnkro|goshasamalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamalro|gokishasamalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamalmu|shasamalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamalnkmu|goshasamalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamalmu|gokishasamalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasamalsher|shasamalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasamalnksher|goshasamalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasamalsher|gokishasamalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasamalng|shasamalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasamalnkng|goshasamalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasamalng|gokishasamalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasamalya|shasamalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasamalnkya|goshasamalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasamalya|gokishasamalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasamalyam|shasamalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasamalnkyam|goshasamalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasamalyam|gokishasamalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasamalnĂŒshĂ«|shasamalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasamalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasamalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasamalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasamalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamalnĂŒro|shasamalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamalnknĂŒro|goshasamalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamalnĂŒro|gokishasamalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamalnĂŒmu|shasamalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamalnknĂŒmu|goshasamalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamalnĂŒmu|gokishasamalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasamalshĂ«nĂŒ|shasamalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasamalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasamalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasamalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamalshĂ«ro|shasamalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamalnkshĂ«ro|goshasamalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamalshĂ«ro|gokishasamalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamalshĂ«mu|shasamalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamalnkshĂ«mu|goshasamalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamalshĂ«mu|gokishasamalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasamalronĂŒ|shasamalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasamalnkronĂŒ|goshasamalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamalronĂŒ|gokishasamalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasamalroshĂ«|shasamalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasamalnkroshĂ«|goshasamalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasamalroshĂ«|gokishasamalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamalromu|shasamalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamalnkromu|goshasamalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamalromu|gokishasamalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasamalmunĂŒ|shasamalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasamalnkmunĂŒ|goshasamalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamalmunĂŒ|gokishasamalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasamalmushĂ«|shasamalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasamalnkmushĂ«|goshasamalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasamalmushĂ«|gokishasamalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamalmuro|shasamalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamalnkmuro|goshasamalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamalmuro|gokishasamalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
